creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Created attachment 249788
apply mutually correct environement extensions to build-tags

Recently made changes to build-related tags within the Makefile of different ports added ${SETENV}/${SETNEVI} and ${MAKE_ENV} just before ${MAKE_CMD) to mitigate issues when using gmake.

I simply followed that strategy by trial and error. The port now builds fine here on CURRENT.
